description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test-Pull-Request that runs on pull request events for the main branch in the src-python folder and on workflow dispatch. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11) in the src-python directory. Checkout the repository, set up Python for each version, install the package locally, install dev dependencies from extras/dev.txt, and run tests with pytest.
